title: lastrea brunoniana
intro: Lastrea brunoniana, also known as the Fern-brake or the Leathery Brake, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an anti-oxidant. The health benefits of Lastrea brunoniana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and is also dried and used in tinctures or capsules for its medicinal properties.
